blocks.text: This book was fetched LIVE from GitHub - the server-driven pipeline works.
This compendium is your single source of truth for the server. Admins customize every page by editing one hosted JSON file.

items: No blocking obelisks, caves, or resource-rich areas.
Report exploits on Discord - do not abuse them.

blocks.text: Repeat rule breaks mean a ban.

children.text: Beach spawns are safest. Avoid swamp and mountains until geared.
Punch trees, craft a pick and hatchet, and raise a thatch shelter before nightfall. Tame a Parasaur or Trike early.

items: Move off the beach by week's end

blocks.text: The apex predator. Knockout tame with tranq arrows from high ground.
Trap it with stone dino gateways before engaging.
Harmless egg machine. Passive tame with berries.
